text: Removed the host.docker.internal extra_hosts mapping from plugin-runner in docker-compose.yml (July 2026). It is not needed: async plugin/coder callbacks reach the app via the Compose service name (http://app:3000/chat), not via the host gateway. The mapping landed on plugin-runner by accident — commit abb8b30 claimed to move it from the database service to the app service but actually moved it from app to plugin-runner. Do not re-add it to plugin-runner: plugin scripts run arbitrary code and the mapping gives them a route to services on the Docker host. If the app ever needs to reach a host-local LLM endpoint (custom baseUrl), add the mapping to the app service instead.
